main.description: A cached AI-generated summary (Catch Me Up) for a single entry. The subject strongRef pins the exact entry version; clients can detect staleness by comparing the CID.

subject.description: The entry record this recap summarises, pinned by CID.

model.description: The model that generated this recap e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6'.

lang.description: BCP-47 language tag of the recap content.
